docs.text: Modbus For Unreal 🤯 Designed for Unreal Engine 5.6 This plugin provides an easy to use blueprint interface to communicate between Modbus devices and the engine.
docs.title: Home

docs.text: Designed for Unreal Engine 5.6 This plugin provides an easy to use blueprint interface to communicate between Modbus devices and the engine.
docs.title: Modbus For Unreal 🤯

docs.text: ModbusError Re-Export of nmbs_error . " nanoMODBUS errors. Values <= 0 are [nanoModbus] errors, > 0 are modbus exceptions " Enum Value Source Description ERROR_INVALID_REQUEST -8 nanoModbus Received invalid request from client ERROR_INVALID_UNIT_ID -7 nanoModbus Received invalid unit ID in response from server ERROR_INVALID_TCP_MBAP -6 nanoModbus Received invalid TCP MBAP ERROR_CRC -5 nanoModbus Received invalid CRC ERROR_TRANSPORT -4 nanoModbus Transport error ERROR_TIMEOUT -3 nanoModbus Read/write timeout occurred ERROR_INVALID_RESPONSE -2 nanoModbus Received invalid response from server ERROR_INVALID_ARGUMENT -1 nanoModbus Invalid argument provided ERROR_NONE 0 nanoModbus No error EXCEPTION_ILLEGAL_FUNCTION 1 Modbus Illegal Function EXCEPTION_ILLEGAL_DATA_ADDRESS 2 Modbus Illegal Data Address EXCEPTION_ILLEGAL_DATA_VALUE 3 Modbus Illegal Data Value EXCEPTION_SERVER_DEVICE_FAILURE 4 Modbus Server Device Failure
docs.title: ModbusError

docs.text: Re-Export of nmbs_error . " nanoMODBUS errors. Values <= 0 are [nanoModbus] errors, > 0 are modbus exceptions " Enum Value Source Description ERROR_INVALID_REQUEST -8 nanoModbus Received invalid request from client ERROR_INVALID_UNIT_ID -7 nanoModbus Received invalid unit ID in response from server ERROR_INVALID_TCP_MBAP -6 nanoModbus Received invalid TCP MBAP ERROR_CRC -5 nanoModbus Received invalid CRC ERROR_TRANSPORT -4 nanoModbus Transport error ERROR_TIMEOUT -3 nanoModbus Read/write timeout occurred ERROR_INVALID_RESPONSE -2 nanoModbus Received invalid response from server ERROR_INVALID_ARGUMENT -1 nanoModbus Invalid argument provided ERROR_NONE 0 nanoModbus No error EXCEPTION_ILLEGAL_FUNCTION 1 Modbus Illegal Function EXCEPTION_ILLEGAL_DATA_ADDRESS 2 Modbus Illegal Data Address EXCEPTION_ILLEGAL_DATA_VALUE 3 Modbus Illegal Data Value EXCEPTION_SERVER_DEVICE_FAILURE 4 Modbus Server Device Failure

docs.text: UModbusClient Inherits : UObject Methods Return Call UModbusClient * Create ( UModbusTcpSocket * InPort, int32 TimeoutMs) bool Init ( UModbusTcpSocket * InPort, int32 TimeoutMs) bool Connect (const FString& Host, int32 Port) void Disconnect () ModbusError ReadHoldingRegister (int32 Address, int32& OutValue) ModbusError ReadManyHoldingRegisters (int32 Address, int32 Count, TArray <int32>& OutValue) ModbusError WriteHoldingRegister (int32 Address, int32 Value) ModbusError WriteManyHoldingRegisters (int32 Address, TArray <int32> Values) ModbusError ReadCoil (int32 Address, bool& OutValue) ModbusError ReadManyCoils (int32 Address, int32 Count, TArray <bool>& OutValue) ModbusError WriteCoil (int32 Address, bool Value) ModbusError WriteManyCoils (int32 Address, TArray <bool> Values) ModbusError ReadInputRegister (int32 Address, int32& OutValue) ModbusError ReadManyInputRegisters (int32 Address, int32 Count, TArray <int32>& OutValue) ModbusError ReadDiscreteInput (int32 Address, bool& OutValue) ModbusError ReadManyDiscreteInputs (int32 Address, int32 Count, TArray <bool>& OutValue) void Client_DebugPrint () void BeginDestroy () Method Descriptions UModbusClient * Create ( UModbusTcpSocket * InPort, int32 TimeoutMs) static link Constructor. Creates a UModbusTcpSocket if the input pointer InPort is null. bool Init ( UModbusTcpSocket * InPort, int32 TimeoutMs) link Attaches InPort and initializes the socket. Called by the constructor. bool Connect ( const FString& Host, int32 Port) link Calls UModbusTcpSocket.Connect() on its attached socket. void Disconnect () link Calls UModbusTcpSocket.Close() on its attached socket if it was attached. ModbusError ReadHoldingRegister ( int32 Address, int32& OutValue) link Writes the contents of the Modbus register at address to OutValue . ModbusError ReadManyHoldingRegisters ( int32 Address, int32 Count, TArray <int32>& OutValue) link Writes the contents of the registers starting from address and ending at address + count to OutValue . ModbusError WriteHoldingRegister ( int32 Address, int32 Value) link Writes Value to the register at the address . ModbusError WriteManyHoldingRegisters ( int32 Address, TArray <int32> Values) link Writes Values to the registers between address and address + Values.size() . ModbusError ReadCoil ( int32 Address, bool& OutValue) link Writes the contents of the Modbus coil at address to OutValue . ModbusError ReadManyCoils ( int32 Address, int32 Count, TArray <bool>& OutValue) link Writes the contents of the coils starting from address and ending at address + count to OutValue . WARNING: This function is not working as expected. We are doing our best to correct this. ModbusError WriteCoil ( int32 Address, bool Value) link Writes Value to the coil at the address . ModbusError WriteManyCoils ( int32 Address, TArray <bool> Values) link Writes Values to the coils between address and address + Values.Num() . ModbusError ReadInputRegister ( int32 Address, int32& OutValue) link Writes the contents of the Modbus input register at address to OutValue . ModbusError ReadManyInputRegisters ( int32 Address, int32 Count, TArray <int32>& OutValue) link Writes the contents of the input registers starting from address and ending at address + count to OutValue . ModbusError ReadDiscreteInput ( int32 Address, bool& OutValue) link Writes the contents of the Modbus discrete input (or "contact") register at address to OutValue . ModbusError ReadManyDiscreteInputs ( int32 Address, int32 Count, TArray <bool>& OutValue) link Writes the contents of the Modbus discrete input (or "contact") registers starting from address and ending at address + count to OutValue . void Client_DebugPrint () link Debug Function that outputs to LogTemp whether the socket is valid (NULL) or not. void BeginDestroy () override virtual link Ensures that the socket is disconnected before destroying this object. Overrides UObject.BeginDestroy()
